subcodes.first_line: In this day the horizon of the heaven of Manifestation shineth bright and resplendent through the Will of God, glorified be His majesty, and at all times doth Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز افق سماء ظهور از اراده حق جل جلاله روشن و منیر است و در جمیع احیان حق
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
